# Package Submission Template

Please follow the instructions below to ensure your package is processed correctly.

## 1. Package Details
- **Distribution:** [Debian / RedHat / Alpine]
- **Package Name:**
- **Version:**
- **Architecture:** [e.g., amd64, x86_64, aarch64]

## 2. Checklist
- [ ] I have placed the package file in the correct directory (e.g., `incoming/debian/`).
- [ ] The package file follows the naming convention (e.g., `name_version_arch.deb`).
- [ ] I have verified the checksum of the package.
- [ ] This is not a duplicate or downgrade of an existing package (unless requested).

## 3. Description
Provide a brief description of the package and its purpose.

---
*Note: Once merged, the package will be automatically signed and added to the repository.*
